title: Outbound connection to Tor exit node
description: Host MERIDIAN-FIN-07 established a connection to 185.220.101.42:443, a known Tor exit node.

title: Encoded PowerShell execution via Office process
description: winword.exe spawned cmd.exe which executed powershell.exe with -EncodedCommand flag.

title: USB mass storage device connected
description: Unregistered USB mass storage device connected to finance workstation.

title: Lateral movement: PsExec service installation
description: PSEXESVC service installed on MERIDIAN-SRV-DB01 from source MERIDIAN-WKS-023.

title: Failed SSH login from internal IP
description: 3 failed SSH logins from 10.0.14.22 to jump host within 60 seconds.

title: Impossible travel — authentication from two continents
description: User bchen@meridian.fin authenticated from Singapore (08:14 SGT) and London (18:14 BST) within 22 minutes.
